title: [v4.1.1-rhel] Backport #15437
body:
Backport #15437 (plus supporting commit 7b3e43c1f6cf27a1cde96c0f650a793a56cebc4c) to v4.1.1-rhel per https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=2132814

```release-note
NONE
```

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/v4.1.1-rhel/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

/hold

Need to wait for approval on the BZ
Tests aren't happy trying to do amd64 builds.  I think this is the footprint of the issues we see in older CI.  @cevich can you confirm/deny please?
looks like missing import of fmt
Build each commit is failing. I'm going to squash both backports down to try and fix it.

LGTM
happy green test buttons and we've RHEL approval to merge.  @bbaude PTAL and merge if it LGTY
